name: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource
description: The product specifies permissions for a security-critical resource in a way that allows unintended actors to read or modify it, enabling unauthorized access to sensitive data or modification of critical configuration and executable files.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL or STORAGE node representing a critical resource (config file, credentials store, executable, database) is created or modified by a TRANSFORM node that sets overly permissive access controls (world-readable, public, 0777) without a CONTROL node enforcing least-privilege permission assignment
